sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63886" key="lopadofushth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λοπᾰδο-φῡσητής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n63886.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dish-piper</tr_>, nickname of Dorion, a glut-tonous flute-player, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0476.tlg001:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Mnesim.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10</biblScope> </bibl>:—perh. with a play on <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">λωτός</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
